testcase.name: tsflab03a

error.message: Error in `base::get(toString(lib_arg), envir)`: object 'dpspath' not found ('test-tsflab03a.R:2:3')

testcase.error: Error in `base::get(toString(lib_arg), envir)`: object 'dpspath' not found Backtrace: x 1. +-testthat::expect_snapshot_file(...) at test-tsflab03a.R:2:3 2. | \-testthat:::check_string(path) 3. | \-testthat:::.rlang_check_is_string(...) 4. | \-rlang::is_string(x) 5. +-scda.test:::write_test_rtf_for("tsflab03a.R") 6. | \-base::source(ipath) at ./helper.R:20:3 7. | +-base::withVisible(eval(ei, envir)) 8. | \-base::eval(ei, envir) 9. | \-base::eval(ei, envir) 10. \-envsetup::read_path(dpspath, "lbtoxgrade.xlsx") 11. \-base::get(toString(lib_arg), envir)
